milestone: clone recovery, custom repository logos, named API app functions, responsive surfaces, and button hints

initialState.baseline: Shared feature worktree is intentionally dirty with the current milestone's implementation and tests; preserve every unrelated or concurrent agent edit.

expectedUiState: Every registered repository page, preferences page, repository-settings page, clone tab, notification tab, and safe dialog/menu surface launches without a blank renderer.
Every audited surface remains vertically reachable without document-level horizontal overflow at all cataloged viewport and zoom scenarios.
Clone selection refreshes after account changes; automatic clone work stays in the background; paused, interrupted, failed, and review-required queues remain recoverable.
Custom repository logos render in the studio, active tabs, and repository list, and named API functions refresh from profile state and execute through bounded app-extension contracts.
Buttons expose accessible names and hover/focus hints; History commits expose the same action menu through pointer and keyboard context-menu routes.
orderedBackgroundInteractions: Preflight the fixed lowlevel-computer-use MCP endpoint and scheduled-task command.
Build the unpackaged development renderer through MCP run_command.
Prepare an isolated local Git fixture and fake GitHub provider beneath the owned run root.
Create one uniquely named off-screen Win32 desktop and launch only the built Desktop Material executable with isolated user data.
Run focused CDP feature verifiers, then the complete responsive surface matrix against the hidden renderer.
Capture and inspect current original-resolution evidence; promote only selected documentation-safe screenshots.
Gracefully close the verified HWND, terminate only the recorded PID if needed, close the owned desktop, and remove only validated owned temporary paths.
declaredTests: focused notification, navigation/context, GitHub API, clone recovery, repository-logo, named-function, and responsive CDP verifiers

build.command: npx --no-install cross-env RELEASE_CHANNEL=development DESKTOP_SKIP_PACKAGE=1 yarn build:prod

featureVerification.repositoryLogoStudio: Passed layer editing, live text, guarded import/export, undo/redo, short-height bottom reachability, tab/list propagation, save/cancel, and cleanup to inherited state.
featureVerification.namedApiFunctions: Passed catalog search, bound GET execution, response redaction, add/reload/app-agent catalog/remove lifecycle, and viewport containment.
featureVerification.compactActions: At 320x240 CSS the run list remained visible, scrolled to its exact bottom, and retained reachable pagination.
featureVerification.compactFileHistory: At 320x240 CSS the unified panel scrolled to its exact bottom and kept Restore reachable; narrow blame rows wrapped without document overflow.
featureVerification.graphQLMutationReview: A shared lexical scanner preserves executable mutation tokens across comments, ordinary strings, escaped block-string triple quotes, and malformed-input fail-closed paths; exact lexical-decoy regressions passed.
featureVerification.cloneRegistrationRecovery: Only repository paths actually accepted by the repository list are finalized; temporarily unavailable completed clones remain journaled with a visible retry and pending completion summary.

validation.eslint: pass over 77 changed TypeScript/TSX/JavaScript files with repository rules

postReviewCloneAndAPIAudit.scope: batch model, journal, recovery UI, GitHub API workbench, and named API definition/store

cleanup.gracefulWindowClose: failed closed because the generic window tool could not resolve an alternate-desktop HWND
cleanup.exactPidTermination: passed with force=false after HWND revalidation
